seo.title: Currency Depreciation Calculator — see what your local currency really earns
seo.description: Free currency depreciation calculator. Compare your local currency in cash, in your bank, and in digital dollar at 10% historical return.

hero.headline: What does your local currency really earn?
hero.subtitle: Compare cash, bank, and digital dollar over time — accounting for currency depreciation.

output.usdLocaleNote: This calculator is most useful for non-USD currencies. For USD holders, depreciation defaults to 0.
output.diboasNote: {rate}% historical return, held in digital dollar

vignette.subtitle: Where you hold your money matters. The currency it earns in matters more.

landing.cardTagline: What does my currency really earn?
